title: Debug CSS with Reproduction, Hypothesis, and Regression Evidence
summary: Build and verify css debug method in field manual Grid overflow and cascade incident through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css debug method from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css debug method without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 06 · Read the field manual Grid overflow and cascade incident case · theory

content.text: A repeatable CSS debugging method records the failing task and conditions, reduces the case, checks parsed and matched rules, inspects cascade and computed values, turns on box and Grid overlays, tests intrinsic sizes and overflow ancestors, changes one variable, and reruns retained scenarios. Random declarations can mask causes and create regressions even when the screenshot improves. Apply it to field manual Grid overflow and cascade incident.
